title: SplashCraft 128x
description: The classic Minecraft experience, reimagined with splash art–inspired visuals in 128x HD !
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89dcd082f6e63807ee49dfb4b7f37c220f642dc4.jpeg)

**SplashCraft 128x** is a high-resolution texture pack that delivers a more detailed and artistic Minecraft experience in 128x, while preserving the game’s original vanilla identity.

The pack is inspired by Minecraft splash art and illustration-style textures, focusing on enhanced detail, depth, and color while keeping the original shapes and pixel structure intact. The result is a refined and immersive visual style that remains fully recognizable and comfortable during gameplay.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b57fa38aa5ab19f1407f3a1a18422da5ae9da1b.jpeg)


## Visual Style

- Splash art–inspired visuals
- Vanilla-friendly textures with enhanced depth and contrast


## Compatibility

128x resolution

- Designed for players who want enhanced visuals
- Compatible with vanilla gameplay and most shaders
